name: Dcim Server
description: Dcim Server is a Rokid Glasses app that serves the gallery as a web server. You can browse and download photos and videos taken with Rokid Glasses through a web browser without connecting a cable.

listing.descriptionMarkdown:
**Dcim Server** is a **Rokid Glasses** app that serves the gallery as a web server. You can browse and download photos and videos taken with Rokid Glasses through a web browser without connecting a cable.

### Usage / Controls

After running the app, connect to Wi-Fi. Access it with a web browser on the same Wi-Fi.
